title: ModCraftTech-servers
description: This is a technical modpack with the create mod and transport tools. This is for servers.
body: This is a technical modpack with the create mod and transport tools. You can drive cars, use new minecarts, or fly airplanes. You can also build machines and industrial facilities. Download the modpack and have fun. If you have any constructive criticism, please post it in the comments. Only for servers. For client I have an other modpack.
